creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
mail/qmail-contrib builds fastforward that forwards email according
to a cdb database. However, databases/cdb was not being built as a dependency.
	One drawback though, due to the way this port works, is that I
need to use ${LOCALBASE}. I am pretty sure there is some other (elegant)
way to do that. If you can, please do.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Build it then try to use a .cdb datase without databases/cdb
